data.name: A01
data.value: This media name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A010
data.value: This adjustment reason name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A011
data.value: This status reason name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A012
data.value: This display text is already in use, please enter a unique display text.fr

data.name: A013
data.value: This request reason name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A05
data.value: This fee type name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A06
data.value: This billing template name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A07
data.value: This requestor type is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A08
data.value: This delivery method name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A09
data.value: This payment method name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A100
data.value: You have made changes that have not been saved. Click "Save && Proceed" to save changes and continue navigating to your selection. Click "Don't Save && Proceed" to discard your changes and continue navigating to your selection. Click "Cancel" to remain where you are and continue working.fr

data.name: A102
data.value: Proceed and no changes will be saved.fr

data.name: A103
data.value: Do not proceed and remain on the page.fr

data.name: A104
data.value: Unknown exception.fr

data.name: A105
data.value: Unable to load file.fr

data.name: A106
data.value: Unable to connect to the ROI server at {0}. Please contact your system administrator.fr

data.name: A107
data.value: Server is busy.fr

data.name: A108
data.value: File not found.fr

data.name: A109
data.value: UI error occurred.fr

data.name: A110
data.value: Unsupported helper type.fr

data.name: A111
data.value: Argument is null.fr

data.name: A112
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected media type?.fr

data.name: A113
data.value: Object not listed in grid.fr

data.name: A114
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected fee type?.fr

data.name: A115
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected delivery method?.fr

data.name: A116
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected payment method?.fr

data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected request reason?.fr

data.name: A119
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected request status reason?.fr

data.name: A121
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected billing template?.fr

data.name: A122
data.value: The string is not a description or value of the specified Enum.fr

data.name: A123
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected requestor type?.fr

data.name: A130
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected clinical system instance?.fr

data.name: ROI.0.0.01
data.value: Seed data cannot be deleted.fr

data.name: ROI.1.2.00
data.value: This delivery method name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: ROI.1.2.01
data.value: Delivery method name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.2.02
data.value: Delivery method operation failed.fr

data.name: ROI.1.2.03
data.value: Delivery method seed data name cannot be modified.fr

data.name: ROI.1.2.04
data.value: Delivery method name should not exceed 20 characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.2.05
data.value: Delivery method URL should not exceed 256 characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.2.06
data.value: Invalid URL.fr

data.name: ROI.1.3.00
data.value: Seed data cannot be modified.fr

data.name: ROI.1.3.01
data.value: Media type name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.3.02
data.value: Seed data cannot be deleted.fr

data.name: ROI.1.3.03
data.value: The selected media type cannot be deleted because it is assigned to a billing tier.fr

data.name: ROI.1.3.04
data.value: Operation failed.fr

data.name: ROI.1.3.05
data.value: Media type name should not exceed 30 characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.3.06
data.value: Media type description should not exceed 256 characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.4.01
data.value: Fee type name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.fr

data.value: The selected fee type cannot be deleted because it is assigned to a billing template.fr

data.name: ROI.1.4.03
data.value: Operation failed.fr

data.name: ROI.1.4.04
data.value: Fee type name should not exceed 256 characters.fr

data.value: Amount format is invalid.fr

data.name: ROI.1.5.00
data.value: Payment method name is not unique.fr

data.name: ROI.1.5.01
data.value: Payment method name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.5.02
data.value: Payment method name should not exceed 20 characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.5.05
data.value: Payment method description should not exceed 256 characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.6.00
data.value: Billing template name should not exceed 256 characters.fr

data.value: Billing template name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.6.02
data.value: The selected billing template cannot be deleted because it is assigned to a requestor type.fr

data.name: ROI.1.6.03
data.value: Billing template operation failed.fr

data.name: ROI.1.7.00
data.value: Number of pages should be between 1-99.fr

data.name: ROI.1.8.00
data.value: Reason name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.8.01
data.value: Reason display text cannot be blank.fr

data.value: This display text is already in use, please enter a unique display text.fr

data.value: Request reason attribute is blank.fr

data.value: Request status cannot be blank.fr

data.value: Reason name should not exceed 256 characters.fr

data.value: Reason display text should not exceed 40 characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.8.07
data.value: Reason operation failed.fr

data.value: Requestor type name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.fr

data.value: Id is invalid. Refresh the data and try again.fr

data.value: Record already modified. Refresh the data and try again.fr

data.name: A101
data.value: Would you like to save changes made to Code Set <{0}> before accessing a new code set?.fr

data.name: A014
data.value: This letter template name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A015
data.value: The selected file is not a valid format for a letter template. Letter template file should be Word Document (*.docx).fr

data.name: A016
data.value: The file path is not valid. Please verify that the path is correct or select another file.fr

data.name: ROI.1.11.00
data.value: Letter template of type "Other" cannot be set as default.fr

data.value: Letter template should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.fr

data.value: Letter template name exceeds maximum length.fr

data.value: Letter template uploaded file name length exceeds maximum length.fr

data.value: File path cannot be empty.fr

data.name: ROI.1.11.08
data.value: Letter template type cannot be blank.fr

data.value: The selected letter template does not have document. Please upload a document for the letter type.fr

data.value: Only a single doctype can be specified per code set.fr

data.name: ROI.1.10.02
data.value: Invalid Document Types Id.fr

data.name: S002
data.value: System Error.fr

data.name: A02
data.value: This billing tier name is already in use, please enter a unique name.fr

data.name: A120
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete the selected billing tier?.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.01
data.value: Billing tier Name should not be empty and accepts only alphanumeric, white space and -_ characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.02
data.value: Billing tier should have a valid media type.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.03
data.value: Billing tier cannot be associated to Non-MPF media type.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.04
data.value: Billing tier must have at least one page tier.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.05
data.value: A base charge rate must be entered. The flat rate charge must be 0 or greater. Valid characters for this field include positive numbers, a decimal point, and precision of 2 decimal places. Ex: 9.98.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.06
data.value: Billing tier associated to a requestor type is being deleted.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.07
data.value: Seed data billing tier name cannot be modified.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.08
data.value: Seed data billing tier's media type cannot be modified.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.10
data.value: Amount format is invalid.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.09
data.value: Billing tier name should not exceed 256 characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.12
data.value: Billing tier base charge should not exceed 6 characters.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.13
data.value: Amount format is invalid.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.14
data.value: The page numbers entered are not sequential. Please enter a page number that is 1 more than the "through page" value entered on the previous tier.fr

data.name: A04
data.value: The billing tier entered already exists. Please edit the page numbers to create a valid billing tier or remove the tier.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.16
data.value: The page number entered is not valid. Please enter a page that is equal to or greater than the starting page.fr

data.name: ROI.1.1.18
data.value: The page number entered is not valid.fr

data.name: ROI.1.6.04
data.value: Please select at least one fee type.fr

data.name: ROI.1.11.10
data.value: The file is in use, please close the file before proceeding.fr

data.value: Access to a file is denied.fr

data.value: The entered date is invalid. Please select a date that is equal to or earlier than the "To" date.fr

data.value: The selected date is invalid because it is in the future. Please select a date that is no later than the current date.fr

data.value: The status of the request cannot be changed unless the documents are released.fr

data.value: Selected request status is not applicable for new request.fr

data.value: Previously released documents cannot be removed.fr

data.value: The value for pages must be greater than 0.fr

data.value: The value for copies must be greater than 0.fr

data.value: Amount entered is invalid. Please enter the amount format eg: 123456.78.fr

data.name: SigninState.ChangePassword
data.value: You have authenticated with a default password that is now required to be changed.fr

data.name: SigninState.InvalidUser
data.value: You do not have the required security to access this application. Please see your system administrator.fr

data.name: SigninState.InvalidUserPassword
data.value: The user ID and/or password submitted are invalid. Please retry. Password is case sensitive.fr

data.name: SigninState.UserDisabled
data.value: Unable to login. User Account is Disabled. Please contact your System Administrator.fr

data.name: SigninState.UserLockedOut
data.value: Maximum sign in attempts exceeded. User Account is Locked. Please contact your System Administrator.fr

data.name: CurrentAndNewPasswordSame
data.value: The new password cannot be the same as your current password.fr

data.name: NewAndConfirmPasswordNotSame
data.value: The new passwords do not match, please re-enter.fr

data.name: ROI.7.0.00
data.value: Request has invalid release details.fr

data.name: ROI.7.0.01
data.value: Request has invalid release charges.fr

data.name: ROI.7.0.02
data.value: Invalid release Id.fr

data.name: changepasswordfailed.title
data.value: Change Password Failed.fr

data.name: changepasswordsuccess.message
data.value: Your password has been successfully updated.fr

data.name: changepasswordsuccess.title
data.value: Password Updated.fr

data.name: fileNameEmpty
data.value: File name cannot be empty and cannot contain any of the following characters '\\', '/', '*', '"', '<', '>', '|'.fr

data.name: ROI.7.0.09
data.value: Request is already released, cannot create a PreBill.fr

data.name: CurrentPasswordDoNotMatch
data.value: The current password is invalid.fr

data.name: AuthenticationFailedException
data.value: AuthenticationFailedException: The system was unable to locate your account. Please verify your User name and Password and try again.fr

data.name: A505
data.value: The entered date is invalid. Please select a date that is equal to or greater than the start date.fr

data.name: ROI.0.0.17
data.value: Data access exception.fr

data.name: ROI.0.0.18
data.value: Retrieving free form facilities operation failed.fr

data.name: ROI.3.1.11
